notes: SHIP v1.14.284 - ACTIVE SHIFT HERO 3a: tech-entered shift end (R1). Ship 3 was split (owner told): 3a = the R1 shift-end MECHANISM + honest states; 3b (next session) = R2 SCAN/LOG/BLOCKER hero verbs + new-blocker capture form + LOG-pill relocation. WHY SPLIT: Ship 3 as speced is six changes on the most-seen surface; splitting keeps blast radius to one coherent feature per stamp. WHAT SHIPPED (redesign-only; ?legacy=1 byte-identical): (1) shift-end data model - one tech-scoped localStorage key phantom_shift_end = {end,setAt}; shift_state() returns unset | countdown | ended; a value >2h past its end is treated STALE and re-prompts (never silently reused, R1), which also lets a night shift count down across midnight without a false stale flag. (2) #cc-shiftpill repurposed via new shift_renderHero(): countdown 'N HR N MIN LEFT' / 'N MIN LEFT' <60 (cyan, R5 active), 'SHIFT ENDED' (gold, R5 attention) for 2h after zero, 'SET SHIFT END' affordance (gold) when unset/stale. The pill is now always shown on Command (shift is tech-scoped, not deployment-scoped) and is tappable to open the sheet. RETIRED the old 'ON SHIFT . Xh Ym' ELAPSED readout (R1 replaces elapsed with remaining). The old pill green #39e09b is gone from all three states (R5: no green in the house) - base green rule left for the 4b CSS sweep. (3) #shiftend-sheet - a .va-sheet bottom sheet (mirrors the .282 log sheet: va-handle/header/close, classList('visible'), initSheetDismiss) with glove-sized preset rows 6:00 AM / 6:00 PM (next occurrence) / +12h (from now) / custom <input type=time> (native iOS picker, next future occurrence) + a Clear-back-to-wall-clock row. (4) tick: shift_renderHero() called from cmd_render AND cmd_clock (updates on the wall-clock cadence; a data-seSig guard skips re-render unless the display string changed, so it never thrashes innerHTML or steals a tap). WALL CLOCK cc-clock UNTOUCHED - it always shows wall time; the countdown lives in the shift pill for 3a and gets promoted to the hero headline in 3b alongside the verbs (model/sheet/state API carry forward, only the render target moves). HONESTY: never invents a remaining time - unset forever = wall clock forever (same law that killed 'Est. 18m left'). DEVIATION/INTERPRETATION (reported): the 2h SHIFT_ENDED_GRACE window is my read of R1's 'SHIFT ENDED at zero' + 're-prompt on new shift' (R1 didn't pin the exact staleness window). TOKENS verified against :root (--cyan/--gold/--slate/--mono/--tap-xl all live; no --vio/--mag). GATES: node --check, CSS brace balance, CRLF preserved, three-stamp .283->.284. DEVICE-VERIFY (John, iPhone, portrait): shift pill shows SET SHIFT END when none set; tap opens the sheet; 6AM/6PM/+12h/custom each set a countdown that reads 'N HR N MIN LEFT' and ticks down; wall clock still shows top-right; leave it running past the end -> SHIFT ENDED gold; Clear returns to SET SHIFT END; swipe/scrim dismiss the sheet; no horizontal overflow; ?legacy=1 unaffected. HARD STOP at device-verify. NEXT: Ship 3b (R2 verbs + blocker form + LOG relocation).
